case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. STEVE MCEUEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,154.10 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MCEUEN, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
